title: IRT scoring procedures for TIMSS data
author: Camilli, Dossey

steps.title: Aggregate factor analysis
steps.instruction: The data were then analyzed with the aggregate model of Camilli and Fox [1]. The goal of exploratory factor analysis at the higher-order level is to discover clusters of items that perform similarly across countries. The clusters are identified by expert interpretation of a loading matrix resulting from an exploratory factor analysis, and then scores are derived that correspond the factor structure. In short, the clusters are the “factors” of factor analysis, and the empirical subscores are factor scores.
